items.title: Hundreds of thousands expected at Pope Leo’s giant Mass in Cameroon’s Douala
items.summary: Hundreds of thousands of people are expected to fill the Japoma Stadium in Cameroon’s largest city Douala on Friday to attend Pope Leo XIV’s Mass. The event is expected to be the biggest during the pontiff’s tour in Africa.

items.title: Trump-Meloni relationship turn sour
items.summary: Far-right Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni was once considered one of Donald Trump’s closest allies in Europe, but their relationship has recently deteriorated. As Caitlin Brown reports, Meloni has fallen out of favor with the US president, in part due to her criticism of the war in Iran and her opposition to his public feud with the Pope.

items.title: Europe faces looming jet fuel shortage: 'Six weeks of fuel left', energy boss warns
items.summary: Rising fuel costs have already prompted many airlines worldwide to raise ticket prices, passing the burden on to passengers. But as the crisis drags on and the Strait of Hormuz remains blocked, both Europe and Asia are now facing a severe fuel shortage that could lead to widespread flight cancellations ahead of the busy summer travel season. Luke Shrago reports.

items.title: Pope blasts 'tyrants' ravaging the world
items.summary: Days after being criticised on social media by US President Donald Trump, Pope Leo continues his four-nation tour of Africa. He is traveling to Douala, the country’s main port city, where he is set to celebrate Mass and visit a hospital. The Vatican expects around 600,000 people to attend the liturgy. On Thursday, the Pope spoke out against war during a visit to the largest city in Cameroon’s anglophone regions, where a nearly decade-long conflict has claimed thousands of lives. Emerald Maxwell

items.title: France, UK host talks on securing Hormuz
items.summary: French President Emmanuel Macron and British Prime Minister Keir Starmer are chairing a meeting of around 40 so-called “non-belligerent” countries this Friday to discuss securing the Strait of Hormuz. The closure of this vital route—now subject to both an Iranian blockade and a retaliatory US one—has triggered what is being described as the worst oil price shock in history. The Paris meeting, with many participants joining via video conference, marks the latest effort by sidelined nations to mit

items.title: What Magyar's election win means for Hungary's economy and Europe
items.summary: Hungary is preparing for a new era, after the centre-right Tisza party of Peter Magyar won a landslide victory over longtime nationalist Prime Minister Viktor Orban. Magyar says he'll seek to repair Hungary's confrontational relationship with the European Union, something that could unlock much-needed EU funding for Ukraine and for Hungary itself. Many voters said the stagnating economy was a major factor in their decision to turn against 16 years of Orban's rule.

items.title: Lebanon army reports number of ceasefire violations
items.summary: A 10-day ceasefire agreement between Lebanon and Israel came into effect this Friday, though the Lebanese army has already reported several alleged violations in the southern border region, where these images were taken. US President Donald Trump announced the deal and said he has invited both countries’ leaders to the White House for further talks. A direct, high-level meeting between Lebanese and Israeli leadership would mark a significant turning point for the region, while the truce also sig

items.title: 'Allies, not vassals': How Meloni's break with Trump became a political moment for Italy
items.summary: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni is managing the repercussions of a public rebuke from US President Donald Trump this week over the pope, Iran and a defence deal with Israel. It's a rupture that had been building since the outbreak of the US-Israel war with Iran and may ultimately serve her political interests ahead of the 2027 legislative elections.

items.title: Conference League: Strasbourg stun Mainz to reach historic semi-finals
items.summary: A two-goal deficit was overcome by Strasbourg, who, spurred on by their home crowd at the Meinau, thrashed Mainz to reach the semi-finals of the Europa Conference League. This is the first time the Alsatians have reached this stage of European competition. "We told ourselves that anything was possible," said Abdoul Ouattara, the Ivorian RC Strasbourg midfielder who scored the equaliser.

items.title: Myanmar’s junta chief-turned civilian president commutes all death sentences
items.summary: Min Aung Hlaing, leader of Myanmar’s junta and last week installed as the country’s civilian president, has issued a blanket order to commute all death sentences. The military junta resumed executions after ousting Nobel Peace Prize winner Aung San Suu Kyi from power in a coup in 2021. Critics say the sitting transition government is merely a civilian rebranding of military rule.

items.title: "Dansons" : Céline Dion dévoile une chanson écrite par Jean-Jacques Goldman
items.summary: Après six ans loin du public, la diva québécoise sort un titre en français. "Dansons", écrit par son compositeur fétiche Jean-Jacques Goldman, a été dévoilé vendredi. Le morceau était très attendu par les fans de la chanteuse qui revient sur scène pour une série de concerts cet automne à Paris.

translation.title: "Dances" : Celine Dion unveils a song written by Jean-Jacques Goldman
translation.summary: After six years away from the public, the Quebec diva released a title in French. "Dance," written by his fetish composer Jean-Jacques Goldman, was unveiled on Friday. The song was very much expected by the singer's fans who are returning to the stage for a series of concerts this autumn in Paris.

items.title: Ligue Europa Conférence : battu à l'aller, Strasbourg renverse Mayence et rejoint le dernier carré
items.summary: Condamnés à remonter 2 buts d'écart et portés par leur public à la Meinau, les Strasbourgeois écrasent Mayence et se qualifient en demi-finales de la Ligue Europa Conférence, une première pour les Alsaciens en Coupe d'Europe. "On s'est dit que tout était possible" réagissait Abdoul Ouattara, milieu de terrain ivoirien du RC Strasbourg, auteur du but de l'égalisation.

translation.title: Europa League Conference: beat on the way, Strasbourg reverses Mainz and joins the last square
translation.summary: Sentenced to go up 2 goals of the gap and carried by their audience to the Meinau, the Strasbourgers crush Mainz and qualify for the semifinals of the Europa Conference League, a first for the Alsatians in the European Cup. "We thought everything was possible," said Abdoul Ouattara, an Ivorian midfielder from RC Strasbourg, who was the author of the goal of equalisation.

items.title: La Birmanie annule toutes les condamnations à mort et gracie l'ancien président
items.summary: Une semaine après avoir prêté serment, le nouveau président birman, Min Aung Hlaing, a annulé, vendredi, toutes les condamnations à mort. Il a aussi approuvé une amnistie en faveur de plus de 4 000 prisonniers, dont une pour l'ancien président Win Myint. En revanche la prix Nobel de la paix Aung San Suu Kyi reste en prison, mais voit sa peine légèrement réduite.

translation.title: Burma cancels all death sentences and pardons former President
translation.summary: A week after being sworn in, the new Burmese president, Min Aung Hlaing, cancelled all death sentences on Friday. He also approved an amnesty for more than 4,000 prisoners, including one for former President Win Myint. On the other hand, Nobel Peace Prize winner Aung San Suu Kyi remains in prison, but his sentence is slightly reduced.

items.title: Emmanuel Macron et Keir Starmer en "mission" sur la sécurisation du détroit d'Ormuz
items.summary: La ⁠France et la Grande-Bretagne ​organisent, vendredi, à Paris, une réunion à laquelle participeront quelque dizaines de pays et ​portant sur la question d'une sécurisation du détroit d'Ormuz une fois que les conditions le permettront.

translation.title: Emmanuel Macron and Keir Starmer in "mission" on securing the Strait of Ormuz
translation.summary: On Friday, in Paris, France and Great Britain will hold a meeting with dozens of countries to discuss the issue of securing the Strait of Ormuz once conditions permit.

items.title: Gabon : l'opposant Alain-Claude Bilie-By-Nze placé sous mandat de dépôt, selon plusieurs sources
items.summary: Arrêté la veille dans le cadre d'une enquête "pour des faits présumés d'escroquerie et d'abus de confiance", le principal opposant gabonais Alain-Claude Bilie-By-Nze a été placé sous mandat de dépôt jeudi soir, ont annoncé deux sources concordantes à l'AFP. Il faisait partie des huit candidats à la dernière présidentielle.

translation.title: Gabon: opponent Alain-Claude Bilie-By-Nze placed under a warrant of deposition, according to several sources
translation.summary: Arrested the day before in the context of an investigation "for alleged acts of fraud and abuse of trust", the main Gabonese opponent Alain-Claude Bilie-By-Nze was placed under a detention warrant on Thursday evening, announced two sources consistent with the AFP. He was one of the eight candidates for the last presidential election.

items.title: Le cessez-le-feu au Liban accueilli entre soulagement et méfiance
items.summary: Dans la nuit de Beyrouth, des tirs nourris célèbrent l'entrée en vigueur du cessez-le-feu entre le Liban et Israël. L'arrêt des combats a été accueilli entre soulagement et méfiance par la population. Le sort de nombreux déplacés reste également en suspens. Juste avant l'entrée en vigueur de la trêve, le Hezbollah a lancé un missile sur le nord d'Israël, qui a été intercepté. Mais des débris ont gravement blessé un homme. En réponse, Tsahal a visé des lanceurs de roquette du groupe chiite.

translation.title: The ceasefire in Lebanon received between relief and mistrust
translation.summary: On Beirut night, heavy fire celebrates the entry into force of the ceasefire between Lebanon and Israel. The cessation of the fighting was welcomed between relief and mistrust by the population. The plight of many internally displaced persons also remains outstanding. Just before the truce came into effect, Hezbollah launched a missile on northern Israel, which was intercepted. But debris seriously hurt a man. In response, IDF targeted rocket launchers from the Shiite group.

items.title: En direct : le Liban rapporte des "actes d'agression" d'Israël, les déplacés affluent vers le Sud
items.summary: Après un mois et demi de conflit, un cessez-le-feu de dix jours est entré en vigueur entre Israël et le Liban, jeudi à 21 h GMT (minuit, heure locale). Mais depuis, l'armée libanaise a accusé Israël d'avoir commis des "actes d'agression" et des bombardements. En représailles, le Hezbollah a annoncé avoir attaqué des soldats israéliens. Suivez notre direct.

translation.title: Live: Lebanon reports Israeli "acts of aggression", displaced people flock to the South
translation.summary: After a month and a half of conflict, a ten-day cease-fire came into effect between Israel and Lebanon on Thursday at 9 p.m. GMT (minuit, local time). But since then, the Lebanese army has accused Israel of committing "aggressions" and bombings. In retaliation, Hezbollah announced that it had attacked Israeli soldiers. Follow our direct.

items.title: Ligue conférence : le RC Strasbourg écrase Mayence et s'offre sa première demi-finale européenne
items.summary: Battu 2-0 au match aller, Strasbourg a réussi à retourner la situation pour s'imposer 4-0 face à Mayence, jeudi. Pour la première fois de leur existence, les Alsaciens se qualifient pour les demi-finales d'une Coupe d'Europe. Ils affronteront les Espagnols du Rayo Vallecano, le 30 avril et le 7 mai.

translation.title: Conference League: RC Strasbourg crushes Mainz and offers its first European semifinal
translation.summary: Battu 2-0 in the game all the way, Strasbourg managed to turn the situation in order to win 4-0 against Mainz on Thursday. For the first time in their existence, the Alsatians qualified for the semi-finals of a European Cup. They will face the Spanish of Rayo Vallecano on 30 April and 7 May.

items.title: Le cessez-le-feu entre Israël et le Liban entre en vigueur, des violations dénoncées
items.summary: Israël et le Liban sont convenus d'un cessez-le-feu de 10 jours, annoncé par Donald Trump, qui a débuté jeudi à minuit. Le président américain souhaite organiser une rencontre entre les dirigeants des deux pays. Benjamin Netanyahu, qui a accepté la trêve, a souligné qu'Israël ne retirerait pas ses troupes et contrôlerait une "zone de sécurité élargie".

translation.title: The cease-fire between Israel and Lebanon enters into force, violations reported
translation.summary: Israel and Lebanon agreed to a 10-day ceasefire, announced by Donald Trump, which began at midnight on Thursday. The US President wishes to organize a meeting between the leaders of the two countries. Benjamin Netanyahu, who accepted the truce, stressed that Israel would not withdraw its troops and control an "enlarged security zone".

items.title: Étape symbolique du pape Léon XIV dans l'épicentre du conflit anglophone à Bamenda, au Cameroun
items.summary: Au deuxième jour de sa visite pontificale au Cameroun, le pape Léon XIV est à Bamenda, chef-lieu de la région anglophone du Nord-Ouest, épicentre de la crise qui déchire les deux régions anglophones du pays depuis plus d'une décennie. Le pape y a prêché la paix et la réconciliation nationale, lors d'une conférence sur la paix et une messe pontificale célébrée en plein air devant des dizaines de milliers de fidèles enthousiastes.

translation.title: The symbolic stage of Pope Leo XIV in the epicentre of the English-speaking conflict in Bamenda, Cameroon
translation.summary: On the second day of his papal visit to Cameroon, Pope Leo XIV is in Bamenda, the capital of the English-speaking region of the North-West, epicenter of the crisis that has been tearing down the two English-speaking regions of the country for more than a decade. The pope preached peace and national reconciliation at a conference on peace and a pontifical mass celebrated in the open air in front of tens of thousands of enthusiastic faithful.

Twenty-two years ago, with the deployment of Xi Jinping, then Secretary-General of Zhejiang Province, the “millions of projects” focusing on the environmental rehabilitation of rural settlements were launched. Out of 34,000 villages in the province, only 4,000 have a better habitat. It was described as “a village after a village, which is full of garbage”. And the farmers described it as: “Getting up early and making money, counting it in the trash, spending it in the hospital.” It can be said that the remediation of the habitat environment was an urgent aspiration of the rural population of Zhejiang at the time. items.title: 韩正会见中美高级别二轨对话美方代表团
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 6月5日，国家副主席韩正在北京会见中美高级别二轨对话美方代表团。 韩正表示，中美关系是当今世界最重要的双边关系之一。当前，中美关系处于关键历史节点。中美相互尊重、和平共处、合作共赢，不仅有利于两国，也有利于世界和平与发展。希望中美高级别二轨对话能不断汇聚两国有识之士的真知灼见，增进美国各界对中国的了解和理解，共同推动中美关系稳定、健康、可持续发展。 美方表示，美中高级别二轨对话有助于双方更好理解对方，为两国关系发展提供更多有益思路。中国经济发展令人钦佩，双方应加强贸易、投资等领域对话合作。

Han is saying that Chinese-American relations are one of the most important bilateral relations in the world today. Currently, US-China relations are at a critical historical node. Mutual respect, peaceful coexistence and co-operation between China and the United States are beneficial not only to both countries but also to world peace and development. It is to be hoped that the high-level second-track dialogue between China and the United States will continue to bring together the insights of knowledgeable people from the two countries, enhance understanding and understanding of China among the United States, and work together to promote stable, healthy and sustainable relations between China and the United States. items.title: 国务院印发《关于开展第四次全国农业普查的通知》

translation.summary: Xinhua News Service, Beijing, 5 June In accordance with the Statistical Law of the People ' s Republic of China and the Regulations on the National Agricultural Census, the State Council decided to conduct the Fourth National Agricultural Census in 2026. The Circular stressed that the Fourth National Agricultural Census was a major national survey on the new quest for a comprehensive revival of the Chinese nation through China's modernization, guided by the Chinese socialist ideology of Xi Jinping's new era, and guided by the spirit of the 20th and 20th China-China Congresses, and by the serious implementation of the Party's central and State Council's decision-making process. It was determined that the census should be conducted in accordance with the law, that the scientific census should be conducted and that the census should be conducted for the people's census, that it should be carried out in accordance with the law, that it should be carried out in a realistic and innovative manner, and that the “three farmers” of the new era should be thoroughly examined in order to objectively reflect new developments in agricultural development, new aspects of rural construction, new changes in rural life and new effects of rural reform. The Circular states that the Fourth National Agricultural Survey is aimed at rural households in the People ' s Republic of China, including rural agricultural producers and other households; urban agricultural producers; agricultural production units; villagers ' committees; and town and town people ' s governments. The main elements of the census include agricultural production conditions, food and food production, new quality of agricultural productivity, basics of rural development, living conditions of rural residents, etc. The standard time of the census is 2400 hours on 31 December 2026, and the data for the period is annual 2026. items.title: 中央军委主席习近平签署命令 发布《军事设施建设条例》
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 中央军委主席习近平日前签署命令，发布《军事设施建设条例》，自2025年8月1日起施行。 条例深入贯彻习近平强军思想，深入贯彻新时代军事战略方针，聚焦服务备战打仗，适应新的领导指挥体制和保障模式，科学规范军事设施建设的基本原则、管理体制、运行机制和工作制度，是军事设施建设工作的重要依据。 条例共11章63条，按照军委管总、战区主战、军种主建的总原则，围绕理顺建设链、管理链、监督链，重点从军事设施建设计划管理、项目审批、工程发包、勘察设计、施工管理、应急建设、安全保密、监督问责等方面，厘清管理权限，优化流程机制，固化实践成果，为提高军事设施建设质量效益和保障能力提供有力法治保障。

(b) To apply the spirit of reform and strict criteria to govern the party, to ensure that the party group (including the party committee of its nature, together with the other party members) is fully accountable to the party ' s principals, to strengthen the monitoring role of the monitoring and oversight bodies (hereinafter referred to as the accredited bodies) and to promote a culture of discipline and anti-corruption with a strict tone, strict measures and strict atmosphere. Article 3 imposes party disciplinary sanctions on members of the party ' s group management, and the inspection and inspection committee (hereinafter referred to as the sent-in agency) appointed by the party ' s team, the disciplinary committee (hereinafter referred to as the sent-in agency) and the accredited body, among others, shall perform their duties in accordance with the established competencies and procedures, enhance coordination and communication, establish an orderly and smooth line of communication and work together to achieve political, disciplinary and social coherence. items.title: 全国人大常委会启动节约能源法执法检查
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 为推动节约能源法全面有效实施，促进更高水平、更高质量做好节能工作，全国人大常委会5日启动节约能源法执法检查。 节约能源法自1998年1月1日实施，并于2007年、2016年、2018年进行了修改。 记者5日从全国人大常委会节约能源法执法检查组第一次全体会议上了解到，为全面深入了解法律实施情况，此次执法检查采取实地检查与委托检查相结合的方式，检查组将赴天津、江苏、湖南、广东、广西、四川等省（区、市）开展实地检查，并委托北京、河北、山西、吉林、上海、重庆等省（市）人大常委会对本行政区域内节约能源法实施情况进行检查。检查组将采取实地检查、听取汇报、组织座谈、典型调研、专题研究、抽查暗访等多种方式，全面准确了解法律实施情况，对带有普遍性的问题深入调查研究。 检查组将重点检查8方面内容：落实节能管理制度情况，推进重点领域节能工作情况，重点用能单位节能管理情况，推动节能技术进步情况，实施节能激励措施情况，与法律配套的行政法规、部门规章以及地方性法规的制定情况，法律实施中存在的其他问题，对节约能源法修改的意见和建议。

translation.title: The Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress initiated an energy-saving law enforcement inspection
translation.summary: In order to promote the full and effective implementation of the Energy Conservation Act and to promote higher and higher-quality energy efficiency, the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress launched an energy conservation law enforcement inspection on 5 June. The Energy Conservation Act has been in force since 1 January 1998 and was amended in 2007, 2016 and 2018. On 5 May, journalists learned from the first plenary meeting of the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress ' s Standing Committee on Energy Conservation Law Enforcement Inspection Unit that, in order to obtain a comprehensive and in-depth understanding of the implementation of the law, the inspection took the form of a combination of on-site inspections and commissioned inspections, which will be carried out in the provinces (districts and municipalities) of Tianjin, Jiangsu, Hunan, Guangdong, Guangxi, Sichuan and Beijing, Hebei, Shanxi, Jilin, Shanghai and Chongqing, among others. The Unit will have a comprehensive and accurate understanding of the implementation of the law and will conduct in-depth research and studies on issues of a general nature, in a variety of ways, including on-site inspections, debriefings, organization of talks, typical research, thematic studies, spot-checking and unannounced visits. The Unit will focus on eight areas: implementation of energy-saving management systems; promotion of energy-saving efforts in priority areas; focus on energy-saving management in energy-use units; promotion of technological progress in energy-saving; implementation of energy-saving incentives; development of administrative, sectoral and local regulations in conjunction with the law; other issues in the implementation of the law; and suggestions and recommendations for changes to the energy-saving law.
